framing: Differential, not a controlled experiment. DORA/Four Keys thresholds are used only for comparable delivery signals; throughput and doc-ops remain internal PMO signals.

source.title: Four Keys Metrics - Deployment Frequency
source.note: Daily bucket: median number of days per week with deployments is >= 3.

source.title: Four Keys Metrics - Lead Time for Changes
source.note: One-day bucket: median lead time to change < 24 * 60 minutes. PMO uses this as a proxy comparator for PR open-to-merge cycle time, not as an identical metric.

source.title: Four Keys Metrics - Lead Time for Changes
source.note: One-week bucket: median lead time to change < 168 * 60 minutes. PMO uses this as a coarse comparator for epic scaffold-to-shipped lead time.

source.title: Four Keys Metrics - Change Failure Rate
source.note: Top bucket is 0-15% failures per deployments.

source.title: Four Keys Metrics - Time to Restore Services
source.note: One-day bucket: median time to resolve < 24 hours. Included for future incident reporting; Sprint 2 templates do not yet render MTTR.
